info.title: AKB Platform REST API
info.description: Root JSON-first OpenAPI contract for AKB platform REST surfaces. Service-local schemas are merged from services/*/openapi.yaml; Next.js web bridge paths are indexed from apps/web/src/app/api.

tags.name: AKB Governed AIIP Upload
tags.description: Dedicated dual-identity, centrally governed AIIP document upload with signed binary transfer and receipt-bound confirmation.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Stable idempotency key retained for 24 hours

200.description: Completed response. Exact idempotent replays return the same body and Idempotency-Replayed: true.

Idempotency-Replayed.description: Present with value true for an exact replay.

400.description: Malformed JSON, header, or request identifier

401.description: Missing, expired, or invalid bearer token

403.description: Wrong service identity, role, audience, or disallowed classification

409.description: Idempotency key conflict or another matching request is processing

422.description: Schema validation or structured model output failure

Retry-After.description: Minimum delay in seconds before retrying with the same idempotency key.

503.description: AKB application processing or identity validation unavailable

post.description: Returns advisory field suggestions only; it never mutates the AIIP record.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Stable idempotency key retained for 24 hours

200.description: Completed response. Exact idempotent replays return the same body and Idempotency-Replayed: true.

Idempotency-Replayed.description: Present with value true for an exact replay.

400.description: Malformed JSON, header, or request identifier

401.description: Missing, expired, or invalid bearer token

403.description: Wrong service identity, role, audience, or disallowed classification

409.description: Idempotency key conflict or another matching request is processing

422.description: Schema validation or structured model output failure

Retry-After.description: Minimum delay in seconds before retrying with the same idempotency key.

503.description: AKB application processing or identity validation unavailable

get.summary: Read sanitized immutable public document metadata
get.description: Anonymous delivery. The Registry performs a fresh central public_read decision and the web boundary applies an exact metadata allowlist. No document body, extracted text, chunk, embedding, prompt, answer, RAG output, or storage URI is returned.

200.description: Sanitized immutable public metadata after a fresh central public_read decision.

429.description: Per-client/publicSlug or global rate/concurrency capacity reached

Retry-After.description: Seconds before the fixed delivery-capacity window should be retried.

404.description: Publication missing, denied, revoked, stale, mismatched, or locally invalid

502.description: Registry response did not match the strict public allowlist

503.description: Central public policy verification or private source delivery unavailable

get.summary: Download a verified immutable public document source
get.description: Anonymous delivery. The web boundary requests a fresh central public_download decision through the private Registry resolver, verifies size and SHA-256 with bounded-memory I/O before streaming, supports Range/ETag, and never exposes the storage URI. Per-client/publicSlug and global rate limits plus held-through-stream concurrency limits return 429 when exceeded.

parameters.name: If-Range
parameters.description: Deliver the requested range only when this strong ETag matches.

200.description: Verified bytes for the exact immutable public document version.

ETag.description: Strong ETag derived from the verified immutable SHA-256.

206.description: Verified byte range for the exact immutable public document version.

ETag.description: Strong ETag derived from the verified immutable SHA-256.

Content-Range.description: Exact delivered byte range and total immutable size.

304.description: The freshly authorized immutable source still matches If-None-Match.

ETag.description: Strong ETag derived from the verified immutable SHA-256.

416.description: Requested byte range is not satisfiable.

429.description: Per-client/publicSlug or global rate/concurrency capacity reached

Retry-After.description: Seconds before the fixed delivery-capacity window should be retried.

404.description: Publication missing, denied, revoked, stale, mismatched, or locally invalid

502.description: Registry response did not match the strict public allowlist

503.description: Central public policy verification or private source delivery unavailable

post.summary: Create a governed AIIP upload session
post.description: Authenticates the dedicated aiip-service transport bearer and the independent current-person bearer carried by X-AIIP-Actor-Authorization, confirms the exact current AIIP source lineage centrally, and returns a policy- and lineage-bound upload session. The opaque upload token is returned only in required_headers.

201.description: Exact centrally confirmed upload session created before binary transfer

400.description: Malformed JSON or invalid file metadata

401.description: Missing or invalid transport or actor credential

403.description: Wrong service identity, route grant, actor, capability, or governed scope

409.description: External identity or immutable lineage conflict

413.description: JSON body or declared file size exceeds its configured bound

415.description: File extension or media type is unsupported

422.description: Strict request, Information Policy, or integration-envelope validation failed

502.description: Registry or central governance confirmation was invalid

503.description: Registry, identity, or central governance verification is unavailable

post.summary: Confirm a governed AIIP upload idempotently
post.description: Requires the original signed upload token and the opaque receipt issued only after exact binary persistence. It re-authenticates both identities, re-confirms the current AIIP lineage, creates or replays the immutable version and ingestion job, then advances current only by compare-and-swap.

200.description: Exact immutable version and ingestion lifecycle replayed without duplication

201.description: Immutable document version and ingestion lifecycle created

400.description: Malformed JSON, invalid receipt, or upload metadata mismatch

401.description: Missing or invalid transport, actor, upload-token, or receipt credential

403.description: Wrong service identity, route grant, actor, capability, or governed scope

409.description: Stale current pointer, changed lineage, or immutable identity conflict

413.description: JSON body exceeds its configured bound

422.description: Strict request, Information Policy, or integration-envelope validation failed

502.description: Registry or central governance confirmation was invalid

503.description: Registry, ingestion, identity, or central governance verification is unavailable

put.description: Accepts only the signed upload token returned in preflight required_headers, reads no more than the signed size, verifies the exact SHA-256, persists the immutable object, and returns an opaque upload receipt required by confirm.

parameters.name: X-AKL-Content-SHA256
parameters.description: Exact lowercase sha256: digest returned by preflight required_headers.

requestBody.description: Raw binary bytes. The wire Content-Type must equal the signed Content-Type returned by preflight required_headers.

201.description: Exact binary persisted and a confirmation-bound receipt issued

400.description: Session, size, hash, or signed metadata mismatch

401.description: Missing, malformed, or invalid signed upload token

413.description: Binary body exceeds the signed or configured size bound

415.description: Content-Type is missing, unsupported, or does not equal the signed media type

aiipActorAuthorization.name: X-AIIP-Actor-Authorization
aiipActorAuthorization.description: Independent fresh current-person bearer. It must be formatted as Bearer <token> and must not equal the aiip-service transport bearer.

uploadTokenAuth.name: X-AKL-Upload-Token
uploadTokenAuth.description: Opaque signed upload token returned only in preflight required_headers.

GenericJson.description: Route-specific schema is defined by the service-local contract or handler documentation.

owner_actor_id.description: Optional consistency claim only; when present it must equal integration_envelope.actor.subjectId and never grants authority.

X-AKL-Upload-Token.description: Opaque signed token; it is never exposed as a top-level response field.

upload_receipt.description: Opaque confirmation credential bound to the persisted session, object key, exact size, and SHA-256.

LlmGatewayServiceInformationPolicyMetada.description: Information Policy V2 context inherited from every document or chunk in the request. External providers reject requests without a supported binding.

control_query.title: Control Query
control_query.default: platne smernice pro rizene dokumenty, platnost, gestor, schvalovani vyjimek
